category_sources: source_facts.description says cross platform C99 library to get CPU features at runtime; official README says it checks CPU features at runtime.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cpu_features; official repository name is google/cpu_features.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README contains usage, supported platforms, and build instructions.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplied as https://github.com/google/cpu_features; per instruction repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe a C99 runtime CPU feature detection library.
